1100704699.english: From the beginning, it was a cursed being born by stealing the body of the saintess, who is your friend, so accepting that fact was even easier.
1100704699.korean: 애초에 여는 그대들의 친구인 성녀의 몸을 빼앗아 태어나는 저주받은 존재이기에, 그 사실을 받아들이는 것도 더욱 쉬웠지.

1100704701.english: There was someone who approached a woman like this first. For someone like this... there was someone who called me a friend.
1100704701.korean: 이런 여에게 먼저 다가와 준 이가 있었다. 이런 여에게… 친구라고 불러 준 이가 있었다.

1100704702.english: Those people... I don't want to disappoint you and Erato.
1100704702.korean: 그런 이들을… 그대와 에라토를 실망시키고 싶지 않다.

1100704703.english: Dragon Slayer, I want to sing on the stage you created. I want to keep my promise to sing you a song. I'd love to practice singing with Erato too...!
1100704703.korean: 용살자, 그대가 만들어 준 무대에서 노래하고 싶다. 그대에게 노래를 들려주겠다는 약속을 지키고 싶다. 에라토와 함께 노래 연습도 해 보고 싶다…!

1100704704.english: Just one day... I want to live just one more day...!
1100704704.korean: 하루만… 단 하루만 더 살고 싶다...!

1100704705.english: So, please. Please let me meet the Queen and the Saint...!
1100704705.korean: 그러니, 부탁한다. 여와 성녀를 만나게 해 다오…!

1100704706.english: Looking at that look in your eyes, I can already guess what you're going to say.
1100704706.korean: 그 눈빛을 보니 오빠가 무슨 말 할지 벌써부터 짐작이 되네.

1100704707.english: Doctor, isn't there anything we can do? Right?

1100704709.english: Well, it's not like I can't do it. Because I have some things I got recently.
1100704709.korean: 뭐, 못 할 것도 없긴 하지. 최근에 얻은 물건도 있으니까.

1100704711.english: Yeah. It was originally a medical device designed to treat PTSD, but... I tinkered with it a bit.
1100704711.korean: 응. 원래는 PTSD를 치료하기 위한 용도로 만들어진 의료기기인데… 내가 좀 손을 봤지.

1100704712.english: Using this, we can access the deep subconscious where the Blind Princess's sister is sleeping.
1100704712.korean: 이걸 이용하면 블라인드 프린세스 언니가 잠들어 있을 심층 의식에 접속할 수 있어.

1100704713.english: However, that's as far as I can go. Because I promised Neodym not to mess with people's minds.
1100704713.korean: 하지만, 내가 할 수 있는 건 거기까지. 네오딤이랑 사람의 정신을 함부로 건드리지 않기로 약속했으니까.

1100704714.english: It's up to you and the witch to persuade the blind princess, sister.
1100704714.korean: 블라인드 프린세스 언니를 설득하는 건 오빠랑 마녀 언니의 몫이야.

1100704716.english: ...Dragon Slayer, will you come with me?

1100704717.english: I just can't do it on my own...

1100704720.english: - That's right. I am not moving to help the dragon witch.
1100704720.korean: - 그렇다. 나는 용의 마녀를 돕기 위해 움직이는 것이 아니다.

1100704721.english: - If I side with the Dragon Witch here... it's the same as neglecting the Blind Princess I've been with all this time.
1100704721.korean: - 여기서 내가 용의 마녀의 편을 든다면… 그건 내가 여태까지 함께 해 왔던 블라인드 프린세스를 홀대하는 것이나 다름없는 짓.

1100704722.english: - Therefore, I am not siding with the Dragon Witch, but rather...
1100704722.korean: - 그렇기에 나는 용의 마녀의 편을 드는 것이 아니라…

1100704723.english: - Because that was the promise the Blind Princess and I made in the past.
1100704723.korean: - 그것이 나와 블라인드 프린세스가 과거에 했던 약속이었으니까.

1100704725.english: Haha, indeed... that's just the kind of thing you would say.

1100704726.english: - A way for the Blind Princess and the Dragon Witch... for everyone to be happy.
1100704726.korean: - 블라인드 프린세스도, 용의 마녀도… 전부 행복해질 수 있는 방법.

1100704727.english: - Somehow, I felt like I could find that method.
1100704727.korean: - 왠지 나는 그 방법을 찾을 수 있을 거라는 생각이 들었다.

1100704728.english: - The Dragon Witch and I accessed the Blind Princess's subconscious using the deep consciousness connector created by the Doctor.
1100704728.korean: - 나와 용의 마녀는 닥터가 만든 심층 의식 접속기를 이용해 블라인드 프린세스의 심층 의식에 접속했다.

1100704729.english: - And the sight we saw was, to put it simply, shocking...
1100704729.korean: - 그리고, 우리가 보게 된 광경은, 그야말로 충격적이라고 밖에 할 수 없었는데…

1100704730.english: Oh, a dragon slayer? I didn't expect to see you here.
1100704730.korean: 어라, 용살자? 여기서 보게 될 줄은 몰랐네요?

1100704731.english: - ...it was the blind princess, who had piled up a lot of liquor bottles and was happily drinking.
1100704731.korean: - …그건 술병을 잔뜩 쌓아두고 신나게 술을 마시고 있는 블라인드 프린세스였다.

1100704732.english: Saint, what in the world is this...?

1100704733.english: As you can see, I'm drinking! Honestly, I don't know why I didn't think of this sooner. Look, Commander! It's in my mind, so the alcohol isn't going down!
1100704733.korean: 보시다시피, 술을 마시는 중이죠! 정말이지, 왜 진작 이런 생각을 못했는지 모르겠네요. 보세요, 사령관! 정신 속이라서 술이 안 줄어들어요!

1100704734.english: Isn't true love about accepting each other's flaws?
1100704734.korean: 서로의 허물조차 받아들이는 것이 진정한 사랑 아닐까요?

1100704735.english: Hoo hoo. For a saint, this is the bare minimum.

1100704736.english: Anyway, you came here to persuade me, right?
1100704736.korean: 아무튼, 절 설득하기 위해 오신 거겠죠?

1100704738.english: Well, of course, that's right... I was watching everything from inside here. Of course, I don't mean I've actually seen it.
1100704738.korean: 뭐, 그야 그렇죠… 이 안에서 다 보고 있었거든요. 물론 실제로 봤다는 말은 아니지만.

1100704739.english: Even with your body taken over... you were aware of everything?
1100704739.korean: 몸을 빼앗긴 상태로도… 전부 인지하고 있었단 말이냐?

1100704740.english: Well... actually, my body wasn't taken over.
1100704740.korean: 그게… 사실 전 몸을 빼앗긴 게 아니었거든요.

1100704742.english: ...I suppose I should tell you what happened after I picked up the staff.
1100704742.korean: …아무래도 지팡이를 집어들고 나서 무슨 일이 있었는지 말씀드려야겠군요.

1100704743.english: As the doctor analyzed, the brainwashing trigger activated after I picked up the cane, and I collapsed immediately.
1100704743.korean: 닥터가 분석한대로, 저는 지팡이를 들고 나서 세뇌 트리거가 작동해 그대로 쓰러졌어요.

1100704744.english: But... um... it's a little embarrassing to say this, but...
1100704744.korean: 하지만… 음… 이렇게 말하자니 조금 부끄럽기는 한데…

1100704745.english: A mere brainwashing program couldn't steal my mind, which had been strengthened by my love for the commander.
1100704745.korean: 겨우 세뇌 프로그램 따위가 사령관에 대한 사랑으로 강해진 제 정신을 빼앗을 수는 없었죠.

1100704747.english: Anyway, so... ta-da! The brainwashing was useless from the start.
1100704747.korean: 아무튼, 그래서… 짜잔! 세뇌는 처음부터 아무런 소용이 없던 거였죠.

1100704748.english: - If it was the truth befitting a blind princess, it was the truth befitting a blind princess.
1100704748.korean: - 블라인드 프린세스답다면 블라인드 프린세스 다운 진실이었다.

1100704749.english: But... then what is the female?

1100704750.english: Hmm... okay. Actually, that was the real problem.
1100704750.korean: 으음… 그래요. 사실, 그게 정말 문제였죠.

1100704751.english: The brainwashing program failed to brainwash me, but your existence didn't disappear entirely.
1100704751.korean: 세뇌 프로그램이 절 세뇌하는 건 실패했지만… 당신의 존재까지 사라진 건 아니었거든요.

1100704752.english: Although you were disappearing as the brainwashing program disappeared.
1100704752.korean: 세뇌 프로그램이 사라지면서 당신도 사라지고 있긴 했지만요.

1100704753.english: But... I didn't want you to just disappear. There are many beautiful things in this world... It's so sad that you'll disappear without even experiencing that...
1100704753.korean: 하지만… 전 당신이 그냥 사라지는 건 원하지 않았어요. 이 세상에는… 아름다운 것들이 많거든요. 그것조차 체험해보지 못하고 사라지는 당신이 너무 안타까워서…

1100704754.english: I decided to give you my body for a little while.
1100704754.korean: 당신에게 잠시 몸을 내 주기로 했죠.

1100704756.english: Oh, I see. All the questions have been answered.

1100704757.english: The opening... it was something that could exist thanks to the saint's mercy.
1100704757.korean: 여는… 성녀의 자비 덕분에 존재할 수 있던 것이었구나.

1100704758.english: It's a bit much to call it mercy. Just... please think of it as me sharing the grace and love I received from the commander with you.
1100704758.korean: 자비라고 하긴 조금 그렇죠. 그냥… 사령관에게 받은 은혜와 사랑을 당신에게 나눠줬다고생각해 주세요.

1100704759.english: And... one more thing I'd like to tell you about...
1100704759.korean: 그리고… 한 가지 더, 이야기를 드리고 싶은데…

1100704760.english: ...I'm afraid I can't give you any more time.
1100704760.korean: …아무래도 더 이상 시간을 드리기는 힘들 것 같아요.

1100704762.english: If it were up to me, I'd give you a day... no, more than a week. But...
1100704762.korean: 마음 같아서는 당신에게 하루… 아니, 일주일도 더 넘는 시간을 드리고 싶어요. 하지만…

1100704763.english: ...I don't think we can slow down the rate at which the brainwashing program is disappearing any further.
1100704763.korean: …세뇌 프로그램이 사라져가는 속도를 더 이상 늦출 수 없을 것 같아요.

1100704765.english: No, it's not. There's no need to have such feelings. I'm being completely sincere.
1100704765.korean: 아니, 아니다. 그런 마음을 품을 필요는 없다. 진심으로 하는 말이다.

1100704766.english: What fault of yours is there in this matter?
1100704766.korean: 이 일에 그대의 잘못이 어디 있다는 말이냐?

1100704767.english: - There was a brief silence between us.

1100704768.english: - And then... the Dragon Witch spoke.

1100704769.english: Finally... I want to say thank you to you and the saint.
1100704769.korean: 마지막으로… 그대와 성녀에게 고맙다는 말을 하고 싶구나.

1100704770.english: The existence of a woman was originally not permitted.
1100704770.korean: 여의 존재는 본래라면 허락되지 않는 것이었다.

1100704771.english: A being born cursed from the beginning, whose mind and memories are stolen from a saint through opening indoctrination.
1100704771.korean: 여는 세뇌를 통해 성녀의 정신과 기억을 빼앗아 태어나는, 태생부터 저주받은 존재.

1100704772.english: However, the saint's spirit, armed with love for you, was so strong that it could not be broken even by brainwashing.
1100704772.korean: 허나 그대에 대한 사랑으로 무장한 성녀의 정신은… 감히 세뇌 따위로는 꺾이지 않을 정도로 강인했다.

1100704773.english: Therefore, Yeo's personality was in a situation where it had to be absorbed and disappear into the saint.
1100704773.korean: 그렇기에 여의 인격은 성녀에게 흡수되어 사라져야 하는 상황이었지.

1100704774.english: However, the saint, feeling pity for the woman's plight, readily offered her own body and gave her a week's time.
1100704774.korean: 하지만 성녀는 여의 신세를 딱히 여겨, 흔쾌히 본인의 몸을 내어주며 일주일의 시간을 주었다.

1100704775.english: They said it was too sad to disappear without experiencing such a beautiful world.
1100704775.korean: 이렇게 아름다운 세상을 겪어보지도 못한 채 사라지는 건 너무 슬프다며 말이다.

1100704776.english: It was thanks to that kindness that I was able to enjoy a short life of leisure, so how could I not be grateful?
1100704776.korean: 그 자비 덕분에 여가 짧은 생을 누릴 수 있던 것이니, 어찌 감사하지 않을 수 있겠느냐.

1100704777.english: A manufactured personality, a borrowed body. It was a life filled with lies, but... I have no regrets.
1100704777.korean: 만들어진 인격에, 빌린 몸. 거짓으로 점철된 삶이었지만… 후회는 없다.

1100704778.english: Because I was able to meet you and learn the feeling of love.
1100704778.korean: 그대와 만나고, 사랑이라는 감정을 배울 수 있었기에.

1100704779.english: - "The Dragon Witch said that and smiled sadly."
1100704779.korean: - 용의 마녀는 그렇게 말하며 서글프게 웃었다.

1100704780.english: ...I just said I have no regrets, but upon further reflection... there is one thing I still have lingering feelings about.
1100704780.korean: …방금 후회는 없다 하였으나, 다시 생각해 보니… 하나 미련이 남는구나.

1100704781.english: I promised to sing you a song, but... I won't be able to keep that promise.
1100704781.korean: 그대에게 노래를 들려주겠다고 약속했는데… 그 약속을 지키지 못하게 되었으니 말이다.

1100704782.english: - ...It seemed it was about time to reveal my solution.
1100704782.korean: - …아무래도 이제 슬슬 내 해결법을 밝힐 때가 된 것 같았다.

1100704783.english: - Because if they dragged the story on any longer, the Dragon Witch would be too embarrassed.
1100704783.korean: - 더 이상 이야기를 끌었다간 용의 마녀가 너무 부끄러워할 것 같았으니 말이다.

1100704785.english: - Actually, I've been wanting to say this since earlier, but the atmosphere was so solemn... I just couldn't bring myself to bring it up.
1100704785.korean: - 사실, 아까부터 말하려고 했지만, 분위기가 너무 숙연해서… 차마 얘기를 꺼내지 못했다.

1100704786.english: - The fact that the Dragon Witch is a different being from the Blind Princess and has a separate personality has been confirmed many times.
1100704786.korean: - 용의 마녀가 블라인드 프린세스와는 다른 존재이며, 별개의 인격체라는 사실은 몇 번이고 확인되었던 것.

1100704787.english: - Then, just like when we revived Lianne's memories, if we create a body based on the Dragon Witch's personality and memories...
1100704787.korean: - 그렇다면, 리앤의 기억을 되살릴 때 그랬듯이, 용의 마녀의 인격과 기억을 베이스로 한 육체를 만들면…

1100704788.english: - Doesn't that mean the Dragon Witch won't disappear, and the Blind Princess won't suffer?
1100704788.korean: - 용의 마녀가 사라질 일도 없고, 블라인드 프린세스가 고생할 일도 없는 것 아닌가.

1100704790.english: ...Are you really saying you'll go that far for me?
1100704790.korean: …정말 여를 위해 그렇게까지 해 주겠다는 말이냐?

1100704791.english: - After listening to me and remaining silent for a moment, the Dragon Witch...
1100704791.korean: - 내 말을 듣고 잠시 가만히 있던 용의 마녀는…

1100704793.english: ...Hmph, no. I just smiled because I remembered something you said before.
1100704793.korean: …후후, 아니다. 전에 여가 했던 말이 떠올라서 웃었을 뿐이다.

1100704794.english: You mean nothing lasts forever in this world?

1100704795.english: Yes, that's exactly what I mean.

1100704796.english: Before, I believed those words were true without a doubt. Because the opening was like a bubble that would soon disappear.
1100704796.korean: 전에는 그 말이 진실이라고 믿어 의심치 않았지. 여는 곧 사라질 물거품 같은 존재였으니까.

1100704797.english: However, now that I'm facing you like this... I can be sure that saying was wrong.
1100704797.korean: 하지만, 지금 이렇게 그대와 마주보고 있으니… 그 말이 틀렸다는 걸 확신할 수 있겠구나.

1100704798.english: It seems the saying that nothing lasts forever isn't true either.
1100704798.korean: 세상에 영원한 것은 없다는 말도 믿을 게 못 되는구나.

1100704799.english: The feeling of love that I received from you, and that I want to return to you...
1100704799.korean: 여가 그대에게 받은, 그리고 그대에게 되돌려주고 싶은 이 사랑이라는 감정은...

1100704800.english: Because it will last forever, even as time passes.

1100704801.english: - And so... the magic wand incident came to an end.
1100704801.korean: - 그렇게… 마법 지팡이 사건은 막을 내렸다.

1100704802.english: - After the biggest problem was solved, the remaining tasks flew by in an instant.
1100704802.korean: - 가장 큰 문제가 해결된 후, 남은 일들은 순식간에 흘러갔다.

1100704803.english: - The Dragon Witch, who had received special training from Erato, gave a wonderful performance at Cafe Amor and received applause from many people.
1100704803.korean: - 에라토의 특훈을 받은 용의 마녀는 카페 아모르에서 멋진 공연을 펼쳤고, 많은 사람들의 박수를 받았다.

1100704804.english: - To celebrate the successful conclusion of the competition, a celebratory banquet was held, and during the toasts...
1100704804.korean: - 대회가 성공적으로 마무리된 기념으로 축하연이 벌어졌고, 술잔이 오가던 도중…

1100704805.english: - Suddenly, the lights in Cafe Amor went out.

1100704806.english: Don't be surprised, this is an event I prepared for you.

1100704807.english: Before opening it... I made a promise with the Dragon Slayer. Someday, I'll tell the dragon slayer the song I sang for him.
1100704807.korean: 여는… 전에 용살자와 한 가지 약속을 했다. 언젠가 용살자에게 여가 부른 노래를 들려주겠다고.

1100704808.english: And in Yeo's opinion... now seems like a very appropriate time to keep that promise.
1100704808.korean: 그리고 여의 생각에는… 지금이 그 약속을 지키기에 아주 적절한 때인 것 같구나.

1100704809.english: This song was composed with the help of Erato and the Muses. Filled with gratitude and love for you...
1100704809.korean: 에라토와 뮤즈의 도움을 받아 작곡한 노래다. 그대에 대한 감사함과 사랑을 담아…

1100704810.english: The fate that changed after meeting you, that happiness...
1100704810.korean: 그대를 만나 뒤바뀐 운명을, 그 행복을…

1100704811.english: I will sing here and now.

1100704812.english: - And then the Dragon Witch began to sing.

1100704813.english: - After finishing the song, the Dragon Witch gracefully bowed and...
1100704813.korean: - 노래를 마치고, 용의 마녀는 우아하게 인사를 남겼고…

1100704815.english: What do you think? It's a touching story, isn't it? And it's also good for the kids to see.
1100704815.korean: 어때요, 감동적인 스토리죠? 아이들이 보기에도 좋고 말이에요.

1100704816.english: - The Blind Princess, who had somehow changed into the costume she would wear during the movie shoot, said with a proud smile.
1100704816.korean: - 어느새 영화 촬영 중에 쓸 코스튬으로 갈아입은 블라인드 프린세스가 뿌듯한 미소를 지으며 말했다.

1100704818.english: Of course, of course. They say that even when hiking in the mountains behind your neighborhood, you'll do better if you wear hiking clothes.
1100704818.korean: 그럼, 그럼. 원래 동네 뒷산을 등산할 때에도 등산복을 입고 가야 더 잘 되는 법이라고.

1100704820.english: Mwahahaha! That's all thanks to Lee Merlin, who was the screenwriter, actor, and the 'director silhouette'!
1100704820.korean: 음하하핫! 그게 다 시나리오 라이터 겸 배우 겸 ‘감독 실루엣’ 역할을 담당하신 이 멀린님의 공이라고!

1100704821.english: I wrote the scenario, you know?

1100704823.english: Of course! It was a familiar voice and silhouette, wasn't it?

1100704824.korean: 설마 나라는 걸 몰라봤던 거야, 아서?

1100704825.english: ...What's that? How could you possibly mistake someone as unique as me!
1100704825.korean: …뭐야 그게? 나처럼 개성 넘치는 사람을 어떻게 헷갈릴 수가 있어!

1100704826.english: You should have known right away, with the power of love!

1100704827.english: Seriously... your romantic score is zero, zero!

1100704828.english: Ahaha, saying it's a zero is too harsh.

1100704829.english: And as a commander, you should get extra points and start with a base score of around 99.
1100704829.korean: 그리고 사령관이면 가산점을 받아서 기본 99점 정도부터 시작해야죠.

1100704830.english: Hmm, 99 points... If it were a mediocre score, I'd argue, but this is hard to argue against...
1100704830.korean: 으음, 99점이라… 어중간한 점수였으면 반박하려고 했는데, 이건 반박하기 힘드네…

1100704831.english: Anyway, since I've received permission, this Merlin will now go and refine the script.
1100704831.korean: 아무튼, 허락도 받았으니 이 멀린님은 각본을 다듬으러 이만 가 보겠다.

1100704833.english: Don't get your clothes too dirty.

1100704834.korean: - 멀린은 그런 말을 남기고 자리를 떠났다.

1100704835.english: Well, Merlin really doesn't mince words, does she?
1100704835.korean: 머, 멀린도 참… 못하는 말이 없네요.

1100704837.english: Commander? I have something to say... could you listen for a moment?
1100704837.korean: 사령관? 할 말이 있는데… 잠깐 들어줄 수 있나요?

1100704838.english: Finally, the lines spoken through the Dragon Witch's mouth...
1100704838.korean: 마지막에, 용의 마녀의 입을 빌려 했던 대사들…

1100704839.english: That's actually what I wanted to tell you myself.
1100704839.korean: 그건 사실 제가 당신에게 직접 전하고 싶었던 말이었어요.

1100704840.english: I was supposed to have disappeared in England, but thanks to you, I was able to survive like this.
1100704840.korean: 원래는 영국에서 사라졌어야 할 저는, 당신 덕분에 이렇게 살아남을 수 있었어요.

1100704841.english: Thanks to you sending Leanne and her group to save me... I was able to survive like this and enjoy my daily life now.
1100704841.korean: 당신이 절 구조하기 위해 리앤 일행을 보낸 덕분에… 제가 이렇게 살아남아서, 지금의 일상을 즐길 수 있게 된 거예요.

1100704842.english: It was fake, created for the sake of acting... but after meeting you and falling in love, it became real.
1100704842.korean: 연기를 하기 위해 만들어진 가짜지만… 당신을 만나고 사랑을 하며 진짜가 될 수 있었어요.

1100704843.english: That's why... because I was reborn after meeting you, and because I am reborn with your help... that's the ending we put in the movie.
1100704843.korean: 그렇기에… 당신과 만나서 다시 태어난 저이기에, 당신의 도움으로 다시 태어난다는… 그런 결말을 영화에 담았던 거예요.

1100704844.english: So, I wanted to say this.
1100704844.korean: 그래서, 이 말을 해 주고 싶었어요.

1100704845.english: I love you, Commander. I love you.

1100704846.english: More than all the world... I love you.
1100704846.korean: 이 세상 전부보다 더… 당신을 사랑해요.

1100704847.english: - Seeing the blind princess smile shyly as she said that...
1100704847.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 수줍게 미소 짓는 블라인드 프린세스를 보며…

1100704848.english: - I got up from my seat and hung a "Do Not Disturb" sign on the door handle of my room.
1100704848.korean: - 나는 자리에서 일어나 방 문 손잡이에 출입 금지 팻말을 걸어두었다.

1100704851.english: I think we'll have to be a bit stricter with the grading criteria.
1100704851.korean: 아무래도 점수를 주는 기준을 좀 까다롭게 잡아야겠네요.

1100704852.english: ...because I want to be together for a long, long time.

1100704853.english: - And, we spent quite a long time together until we got the remaining point.
1100704853.korean: - 그리고, 우리는 남은 1점을 받을 때까지 꽤나 긴 시간을 함께 보냈다.

1100704854.english: - ...Well, it's only natural, but... The costume had to be remade.
1100704854.korean: - …뭐, 당연한 일이지만... 의상은 다시 만들어야만 했다.

1100704857.english: I didn't do it while eating.

1100704860.english: No, I haven't said anything yet, have I?
1100704860.korean: 아니, 아직 아무 말도 안 했거든?

1100704861.english: Are you a child or something...?

1100704865.english: ...No, what kind of file is it?

1100704867.english: There shouldn't have been anyone in the park...

1100704868.english: ...I'm really sorry, what should I do about this?

1100704870.english: Okay, if that's the case, I'm all for it.

1100704875.english: Is the staff a mind control device?

1100704877.english: They used that kind of technology to make the movie?

1100704879.english: Someone else... who would be good?

1100704880.english: As expected of the Harpy King. They're very reliable.

1100704881.english: I heard the blind princess became the queen.

1100704882.english: ...you are the king of the pigeons for the time being.

1100704885.english: Then should we look into that next project?
1100704885.korean: 그럼 그 차기작에 대해서 알아봐야 하나?

1100704886.english: Sorry, I thought it might be an uncomfortable topic.

1100704888.english: At least I'm not planning to stab you to death.
1100704888.korean: 적어도 난 널 찔러 죽일 생각은 없어.

1100704889.english: ...You're going to get hit if you keep that up.

1100704892.english: I suppose so. But... are you okay?

1100704893.english: ...Okay. There were quite a few strange parts.

1100704894.english: Let's wait and see for now.

1100704895.english: You two are always bickering, aren't you?

1100704896.english: That's something I should probably pay a little attention to.
1100704896.korean: 그 점은 내가 신경을 좀 써야 할 것 같네.

1100704897.english: Oh, you're right. That was really the melody, wasn't it?

1100704901.english: Certainly, now that you mention it... that's right.

1100704903.english: Well, why not just tell the truth?
1100704903.korean: 뭐, 그냥 사실대로 말하면 되지 않을까?

1100704906.english: They held a singing competition at Cafe Amor.

1100704908.english: Don't worry. There will be a lot of beginners too.
1100704908.korean: 걱정하지 마. 초보자들도 많이 나올 거야.

1100704909.english: If you don't want to go, you don't have to.

1100704910.english: So, can we hear the Dragon Witch's song?
1100704910.korean: 그럼 용의 마녀의 노래를 들어볼 수 있는 건가?

1100704911.english: Alright! Okay, I'll go submit the application right away!
1100704911.korean: 좋았어! 그럼, 내가 바로 신청서 제출하러 갈게!

1100704912.english: I'm a human word processor right now...!

1100704913.english: I'm sorry!! I'll work overtime in moderation!

1100704915.english: ...No, I just wasn't expecting anyone to come.
1100704915.korean: …아니, 그냥 누가 올 줄 모르고 있었지.

1100704917.english: That outfit suits you well too.

1100704923.english: "If things had gone as planned," you mean?

1100704928.english: ...You're really a doctor, aren't you? That's right.

1100704930.english: But I'm not going to help you.
1100704930.korean: 하지만, 난 널 도우러 가는 게 아니야.

1100704931.english: We'll create an ending where everyone is happy.

1100704932.english: ...So you're not even trying to hide it anymore.

1100704938.english: I think I've found a solution.

1100704939.english: ...you can just make another body, right?

1100704940.english: That's nothing, it's not even difficult...
1100704940.korean: 그 정도야 뭐, 어려운 일도 아니지…

1100704941.english: What's wrong? Is there a problem?

1100704944.english: Wait, was that you at the beginning, the silhouette of the director?
1100704944.korean: 잠깐, 처음에 감독 실루엣으로 나온 게 너였어?

1100704945.english: No, it's just that... I was getting you mixed up with other people for some reason.
1100704945.korean: 아니, 그게… 어쩐지 다른 사람들이랑 좀 헷갈려서.

1100704946.english: And how are you supposed to recognize a silhouette in the first place?!

1100704947.english: Even so, 99 points is a bit...

1100704948.english: No, I'm telling you to object.

1100704952.english: I think I need to fill up my romantic score by 1 point.
1100704952.korean: 아무래도 로맨틱 점수 1점을 채워야 할 것 같아서.

1100704956.english: I'm not just me, I'm a Bioroid, a Commander, a friend, a family member. Someone once said that others are hell, but for me, others are heaven. Because I become happy thanks to others. And now... because you, my beloved, see me as a woman you love, I am happier than ever before. I'll sing about this moment forever.
1100704956.korean: 저는 단순히 제가 아니라 바이오로이드, 지휘관, 친구, 가족이죠. 누군가는 타인이 지옥이라고 말했지만… 저에게는 타인은 천국이에요. 타인 덕분에 행복해지니까요. 그리고 지금… 사랑하는 당신께서 저를 사랑하는 여자로 봐주시기에 그 어떤 때보다 행복해요. 이 순간을 영원히 노래할게요.

1100704957.english: Master? Savior? From what perspective would you... haha, I shouldn't have said that. Either way, they are precious to me, and someone I love has given me a token of their affection. Now I don't have to hold back this overflowing love, do I? Hehe, then shall we share love together?
1100704957.korean: 주인님? 구원자님? 어느 입장에서 저에게 반지를… 후후, 괜한 소리를 했네요. 어느 쪽이든 저에게 소중하고, 제가 사랑하는 분께서 저에게 사랑의 증표를 내려주셨는데. 이제는 이 넘치는 사랑을 참지 않아도 되는거죠? 후후, 그러면 함께 사랑을 나눠볼까요?

1100704961.english: Mom! The werewolf asked me to play with her. Can I go play and then come back?
1100704961.korean: 엄마! 워울프가 같이 놀자고 했는데 놀다 와도 돼요?

1100704964.english: You're not playing with the werewolf all by yourself, are you?
1100704964.korean: 워울프랑 단 둘이서 노는 건 아니지?

1100704968.english: I feel uneasy when those two are together...

1100704970.english: No, those two got into trouble recently and were demoted...
1100704970.korean: 아니, 그 둘 얼마 전에 사고쳐서 강등-

1100704971.english: (……No, but still, aren't they at least not that lacking in common sense?)
1100704971.korean: (……아니, 그래도 그 정도로 상식이 없지는 않나?)

1100704972.english: (No, did they do that because they have common sense?)

1100704973.english: (But I've been doing well so far...)

1100704975.english: (My mom isn't saying anything either, so I'm wondering if it's right for me to be arguing about this...)
1100704975.korean: (엄마도 아무 말 안 하시는데 내가 왈가불가하는 게 맞나 싶기도 하고…)

1100704979.english: Hehe, the Bulgasari wanted to play too, huh? Of course!

1100704980.english: (I need to keep an eye on the werewolves and brownies to make sure they're not teaching Draco anything strange.)
1100704980.korean: (워울프랑 브라우니가 드라코한테 이상한 거 가르치지 않나 감시해야지.)

1100704982.english: Didn't you hear what Mom said this morning?
1100704982.korean: 아침에 엄마가 하는 말 못 들었어?

1100704983.english: You said you were meeting a friend.

1100704984.english: Is the seat next to you free?

1100704987.korean: 여기 같은 걸로 한 잔 더요.

1100704989.english: We've both been busy lately, so it's been a while since we've met like this, hasn't it?
1100704989.korean: 요즘 피차 바빠서 이렇게 만나는 건 오랜만이죠?

1100704990.english: That's true, but thanks to the information shared within Orca, don't we all generally know how each other is doing?
1100704990.korean: 그렇긴 합니다만 그래도 오르카 내에서 정보가 공유되는 덕분에 대충 서로 어떻게 지내는지 잘 알지 않습니까.

1100704992.english: Even back then, I knew very well how you were doing.
1100704992.korean: 옛날에도 당신이 어떻게 지내는지는 잘 알고 있었어요.

1100704993.english: They're not part of an intelligence agency for nothing.

1100704995.english: If you don't get caught, there's no problem, right?

1100704996.english: And I was also prepared for the possibility of being caught.
1100704996.korean: 그리고 들켰을 때를 위한 대비도 했고요.

1100704997.english: What kind of contrast is it?

1100704998.english: It means identifying the movements of groups that could become obstacles during the operation in advance.
1100704998.korean: 작전 중 방해 요소가 될 집단의 움직임을 미리 파악한다는 것요.

1100705000.english: Sometimes it was like that, and sometimes it wasn't.
1100705000.korean: 그럴 때도 있었고, 아닐 때도 있었죠.

1100705001.english: But when we first met, you interfered with our operation, didn't you?
1100705001.korean: 하지만 처음 만났을 때는 우리 작전을 방해하셨잖아요?

1100705002.english: I was just carrying out the operation.

1100705003.english: Even if I could go back to that time, I would have continued the operation.
1100705003.korean: 다시 그 때로 돌아간다고 하더라도 저는 작전을 속행했을 겁니다.

1100705005.english: How are you going to carry all those things here?
1100705005.korean: 그 많은 물건을 여기까지 어떻게 가져오나요?

1100705006.english: I had my belongings seized by the City Guard branch.
1100705006.korean: 시티 가드 지부에 물건을 압류당하게 했어요.

1100705007.english: The items will be stored at the branch until the day of the operation. On the day of the operation, attack the City Guard branch, retrieve the items, and launch the operation.
1100705007.korean: 거사일 전까지는 지부에 물건들이 보관되어 있을 테니까. 거사 당일에 시티가드 지부를 습격해서 물건들을 회수하고 거사를 일으키세요.

1100705008.english: The weapons to attack the City Guard have already been moved near the branch, so you can use those to attack them.
1100705008.korean: 시티 가드를 습격할 무기들은 지부 근방에 미리 옮겨 뒀으니까 그걸로 시티 가드를 습격하시면 될 거예요.

1100705010.english: Because creativity is important even in terrorism.

1100705012.english: What we're doing is, at the end of the day, a show of force for the people whose lives were taken by the Bioroids.
1100705012.korean: 우리가 하는 것은 어디까지나 바이오로이드에게 삶을 빼앗긴 사람들을 위한 무력 시위다.

1100705013.english: I'm trying to show those who prioritize Bioroids over humans that humans are not passive beings.
1100705013.korean: 인간이 아닌 바이오로이드를 우선시 하는 놈들에게 인간은 가만히 있는 존재가 아니라는 것을 알려주려는 거다.

1100705014.english: For their own safety, they chose Bioroids over their fellow humans.
1100705014.korean: 자신의 안위를 위해 동포인 인간이 아닌 바이오로이드를 선택하고-

1100705015.english: (How would this Bioroid hater react if they knew the person in front of them was a Bioroid and not human?)
1100705015.korean: (이 바이오로이드 혐오자가 자기 앞에 있는 사람이 인간이 아닌 바이오로이드라는 것을 알면 어떻게 행동할까?)

1100705016.english: (And what if they found out their actions were all being controlled by a Bioroid?)
1100705016.korean: (그리고 자신의 행동이 전부 바이오로이드에 의해 조종당하고 있다는 것을 알게 된다면?)

1100705018.english: (Is a person unhappy if they act to the end without knowing their beliefs were instilled in them by others?)
1100705018.korean: (자신의 신념이 남에게 주입된 것을 모른 채로 끝까지 행동하는 사람이 불행할까?)

1100705019.english: (Or are we unhappy because we know all our actions and still follow through with evil?)
1100705019.korean: (아니면 자신의 행동을 전부 알면서 그대로 악행까지 따르는 우리가 불행할까?)

1100705020.english: (Even if you try to measure the degree of misfortune, it won't improve your situation.)
1100705020.korean: (……불행의 정도를 따져봤자 처지가 나아지는 것도 아닌데.)

1100705022.english: (Even if I get bored... it's not like there's anything I can do about it...)
1100705022.korean: (권태가 와도… 어쩔 수 있는 건 아니지만…)

1100705023.english: And so, we shall return to the pure days of old, when there were no Bioroids!
1100705023.korean: 그리하여 우리는 그 옛날 바이오로이드가 없던 순수한 시절로 돌아갈 것이다!

1100705031.english: Put your hands on your head and lie down!

1100705034.english: I'll be damned if I get caught by a Bioroid!

1100705037.english: Put your hands on your head and get down!

1100705041.english: (Although, it's more likely that the self-proclaimed activist left the trace, rather than me...)
1100705041.korean: (나보다는… 자칭 운동가분께서 흔적을 남겼을 확률이 더 높겠지만.)

1100705043.english: Yes. Yes. I won't resist, so please don't be violent.
1100705043.korean: 네. 네. 저항 안 할 테니까 난폭하게 굴지 말아주세요.

1100705046.english: The first meeting wasn't too bad, was it?

1100705047.english: For me, it's difficult to say whether it's good or bad.

1100705048.english: At that time, you were simply the target of our operation.
1100705048.korean: 그 당시 당신은 그저 저희 작전의 목표였으니까요.

1100705049.english: That's disappointing. At that time, you arrested that self-proclaimed activist, which completely ruined the operation we had been preparing for months...
1100705049.korean: 섭섭해라. 그 때 당신들이 그 자칭 운동가를 체포해버려서 저희가 수개월에 걸쳐 준비했던 작전이 전부 물거품이 되어버렸는데…

1100705050.english: However, the operation we had been preparing for months was successful.
1100705050.korean: 저희는 수개월에 걸쳐 준비했던 작전이 성공했었지만요.

1100705051.english: It's a bit upsetting to see someone boasting about their success while knowing I failed.
1100705051.korean: 제가 실패한 것을 알면서 자신은 성공했다고 뽐내는 것을 보니 조금 기분이 상하네요.

1100705053.korean: 여기 같은 걸로 한 잔 더요.

1100705055.english: Even so, if I were to confess late...

1100705056.english: I was arrested, fingerprinted at the police station, and then returned to 080.
1100705056.korean: 저는 체포되고 유치장에 발도장만 찍고 080으로 귀환했죠.

1100705060.english: Currently, the hostage-takers are holding staff, patients, and related personnel hostage at the hospital and are engaged in a standoff.
1100705060.korean: 현재 인질범들이 병원에서 직원과 환자, 관계자들을 인질로 붙잡고 농성을 벌이고 있는 중입니다.

1100705061.english: While the negotiation expert keeps the hostage-takers distracted, quickly move in and subdue them.
1100705061.korean: 협상 전문가가 인질범들의 주의를 붙잡고 있는 동안에 빠르게 돌입하여 인질범들을 제압합니다.

1100705062.english: You remember the entire structure of the hospital, right?

1100705065.english: ...Draco will charge in with me, so just follow my orders.
1100705065.korean: ……드라코는 저와 함께 돌입할 테니 제 명령에 따르면 됩니다.

1100705066.english: Miho. We will commence our attack simultaneously with your deployment.

1100705069.english: Give me the signal and I'll snipe.

1100705070.english: Okay, I understand. We will commence the operation on the count of three.

1100705073.english: (The hostage rescue operation has begun. Let's be quiet until it's over.
1100705073.korean: (인질 구출 작전이 시작됐네. 끝날 때까지 얌전히 있자.)

1100705074.english: (It really hits home how frequent terrorism has become.)

1100705075.english: (But if it's a hostage rescue operation, then again this time?)

1100705077.english: Are there any bad guys here?

1100705082.english: Hehe, you can relax now that we're here!

1100705087.english: (It looks like the arms dealer we arrested last time.)
1100705087.korean: (지난 번에 체포한 무기상과 닮은 거 같은데.)

1100705091.english: (No way... is that the Crimson that arrested me before?)

1100705093.english: (It's probably just someone who looks similar.)

1100705095.english: (I think that's the HongRyeon who arrested me before.)
1100705095.korean: (전에 날 체포한 홍련이 맞는 거 같은데.)

1100705097.english: (Once we met as the criminal, and this time we're meeting as hostages.)
1100705097.korean: (한 번은 범인으로 만나고, 이번에는 인질로 만나고.)

1100705098.english: (It's a shame I can't talk about this coincidence with anyone.)
1100705098.korean: (누구랑 같이 이 우연에 대해서 대화를 나눌 수 없는 게 아쉽네.)

1100705099.english: (Could it be that we're meeting again...?)

1100705100.english: At that time, I thought, "We'll never meet again, will we?" I thought, "That's what I'll do."

1100705101.english: But we met again, didn't we?

1100705102.english: Since we're on the subject, I have a question. Can I ask it?
1100705102.korean: 말 나온 김에 궁금한 것이 생겼는데 질문해도 될까요?

1100705104.english: Why were you in the hospital at that time?

1100705105.english: The family of an anti-establishment activist was hospitalized.
1100705105.korean: 반체제 운동가의 가족이 병원에 입원해 있었거든요.

1100705106.english: I infiltrated to contact that family and find out the location of the anti-regime activist.
1100705106.korean: 그 가족과 접촉해서 반체제 운동가의 위치를 파악하려고 잠입했었죠.

1100705107.english: As a result, you took that person away too.
1100705107.korean: 결과적으로 그 사람도 당신들이 잡아가 버렸지만요.

1100705108.english: It would be strange to apologize here.

1100705109.english: Oh, I'd love to hear you apologize!
1100705109.korean: 어머, 저는 당신이 사과하는 것을 듣고 싶은걸요?

1100705110.english: I have nothing to apologize for because I did nothing wrong.

1100705112.english: Since you're always serious, when you're joking, you have to say it was a joke, right?
1100705112.korean: 당신은 언제나 진지하니까 농담할 때는 농담이었다고 말을 해야 하잖아요?

1100705113.english: I also joke when it's time to joke.

1100705114.english: Then please tell me a joke now.

1100705118.english: Haha, it's amusing to see you struggling to come up with a joke somehow.
1100705118.korean: 후후, 당신이 어떻게든 농담을 하려고 고심하는 것도 재밌네요.

1100705120.english: How many times have we been outsmarted by the Mongoose team?

1100705121.english: Still... there were times we cooperated, right?

1100705122.english: Looking back now, we actually worked together quite a bit, without even realizing it.
1100705122.korean: 지금 생각해보면 알게 모르게 같이 일을 했던 적이 많았었죠.

1100705124.english: Damn it! This is dereliction of duty!

1100705125.english: Isn't it natural that you should give advance notice on days like this?
1100705125.korean: 이런 날은 미리 예보를 해야하는 게 당연한 거 아니냐?

1100705126.english: Oh. Oh. I will tell you today's forecast.

1100705127.english: Today is the anniversary of Uncle Owen's assassination, and there are plans for terrorist attacks worldwide. Therefore, you will need to be especially careful when going out.
1100705127.korean: 오늘은 엉클 오웬이 사살된 기념일로 전 세계적으로 테러가 일어날 예정이오니 외출하실 때 각별한 주의가 필요할 것입니다.

1100705129.english: The Inferno Tower site lockdown is over.

1100705130.english: We've deployed personnel everyplace we've identified, not just on the ground and the lower floors of buildings, but also in the underground areas connected to the buildings.
1100705130.korean: 지상과 빌딩 저층은 물론이고, 빌딩과 연결되는 지하 일대도 파악한 곳은 모두 인력을 배치했어.

1100705131.english: Also, we've established a no-fly zone within a 10km radius of the building, and we're currently tracking all aircraft outside that zone in real-time.
1100705131.korean: 또 건물 반경 10km내를 비행금지구역으로 설정했고, 구역 밖의 비행체도 전부 실시간으로 파악하고 있는 중이야.

1100705132.english: The hostage-takers are members of the anti-company, anti-android group called the 'Angry Humans'.

1100705133.english: Damn it. Where did these stray dogs come from?
1100705133.korean: 염병. 이건 또 어디서 굴러먹다 튀어나온 개뼈다귀들이야?

1100705134.english: How is it that terrorist groups are forming faster than convenience stores are opening? Everyone and their dog is a terrorist organization. Every Tom, Dick, and Harry is a terrorist organization.
1100705134.korean: 어떻게 돼먹은 게 편의점 생기는 속도보다 테러 단체 생기는 속도가 더 빠르냐. 개나 소나 테러 단체야. 개나 소나 테러 단체.

1100705136.english: ...According to the information available, the hostage-takers number 120.

1100705137.english: There are also plenty of guys who have nothing to do. Instead of acting like this, why don't you think about giving your parents some pocket money?
1100705137.korean: 진짜 할 일 없는 놈들도 넘쳐난다. 이 지랄 할 시간에 부모님 용돈 드릴 궁리나 하던가.

1100705138.english: Could it be because they lost their parents at a young age?

1100705140.english: ...I'm sorry for interrupting you so much. Understand. This is what happens when you encounter terrorism more often than three meals a day.
1100705140.korean: ……계속 말 끊어서 미안하다. 이해해라. 하루 삼시 세끼보다 테러를 더 자주 마주치면 이렇게 되니까.

1100705141.english: The terrorist attack sites elsewhere are still in a standoff, aren't they?
1100705141.korean: 다른 곳에 있는 테러 현장도 아직 대치 중인 상황이잖냐.

1100705143.english: The number of hostages is estimated to be around 2,000.

1100705146.english: While it's not the exact number, it's said that the hostage-takers stormed in during the future Bioroid conference.
1100705146.korean: 정확한 수는 아니지만 미래 바이오로이드 콘퍼런스가 열리던 중에 인질범들이 난입했다고 합니다.

1100705147.english: I've compiled a list of conference attendees who haven't been reachable.
1100705147.korean: 콘퍼런스 참여 인원 목록에서 연락이 안 되는 인원을 추렸습니다.

1100705148.english: How did so many hostage-takers break in?

1100705149.english: According to the testimony of those who escaped safely, there was a hostage-taker among the security personnel.
1100705149.korean: 무사히 탈출한 사람들의 증언에 따르자면 보안 인원들 중에 인질범이 있었다고 했어.

1100705150.english: It wasn't something they prepared in just a day or two, was it?

1100705151.english: Which of the hostages are VIPs?

1100705152.english: Deputy Director of the Bioroid Investigation Bureau, Director of the Welfare Housing Management and Supervision Agency, one Senator, three Representatives, and a Black River Executive Director...
1100705152.korean: 바이오로이드 조사국 부국장, 복지주택관리감독청 청장, 상원의원 1명에 하원의원 3명, 블랙리버 상무 이사……

1100705154.english: HongRyeon. What is the hostages' situation and the hostage-takers' weaponry?

1100705155.english: The hostage-takers were armed not only with personal firearms but also with heavy weapons, including heavy machine guns and grenade launchers, and had planted a large amount of explosives.
1100705155.korean: 인질범들은 개인화기뿐만 아니라 중기관총과 유탄발사기를 비롯한 중화기로 무장하고 대량의 폭발물을 설치했습니다.

1100705156.english: Also, the conference was being held across three floors: the 138th, 139th, and 140th.
1100705156.korean: 또한 콘퍼런스는 138층, 139층, 140층 총 세 층에 나눠서 진행되고 있었습니다.

1100705157.english: We have confirmed that the hostage-takers are still holding out, divided into three groups on different floors.
1100705157.korean: 인질범들은 그대로 세 층에 나눠서 농성중인 것으로 파악했습니다.

1100705158.english: What are the hostage takers' demands?

1100705159.english: Strengthening regulations on Bioroids and expanding welfare for humans.
1100705159.korean: 바이오로이드에 대한 규제 강화 및 인간에 대한 복지 확대.

1100705160.english: Since it's not something that can be done overnight, this was probably just a shot in the dark.
1100705160.korean: 하루 아침에 안 되는 거니까 이건 그냥 넣어본 거겠고.

1100705161.english: They demanded the release and safety of their comrades in prison, as well as the payment of ransom for the hostages.
1100705161.korean: 감옥에 있는 동지들의 석방과 안전책 마련, 인질들에 대한 몸값 지불을 요구했어.

1100705163.english: They said there would be no negotiations with the terrorists.

1100705164.english: HongRyeon. Do you think we can get through this hostage situation safely?
1100705164.korean: 홍련. 이번 인질극 무사히 끝낼 수 있겠냐?

1100705167.english: Suppression is possible, but we anticipate significant casualties among both the hostages and our own forces.
1100705167.korean: 진압은 가능하겠지만 인질들의 피해도, 저희들의 피해도 막대할 것으로 예상됩니다.

1100705168.english: The number of hostages and hostage-takers is large, the scene is fortified across multiple floors, a forceful suppression without casualties is difficult, and negotiation is impossible...
1100705168.korean: 인질이랑 인질범의 수는 많아, 현장은 여러 층으로 요새화되어 있어, 피해 없이 무력 진압은 힘들어, 협상은 불가능해…

1100705171.english: Can you write it for me?

1100705174.english: Ahaha... after this situation is over.

1100705175.english: I believe that obligations should be fulfilled regardless of whether a solution exists or not.
1100705175.korean: 의무의 이행은 해결책의 유무에 상관없이 실현되어야 하는 거라고 생각해요.

1100705176.english: This is the counter-terrorism headquarters. Civilians are prohibited from entering.
1100705176.korean: 이곳은 테러 대책 본부입니다. 민간인은 출입금-

1100705179.english: ...A civilian wouldn't just walk in here without a care in the world, would they?

1100705181.english: What is your name and title?

1100705182.english: It doesn't matter who I am.

1100705183.english: What's important right now is how I can help you.
1100705183.korean: 지금 중요한 건 제가 당신들에게 어떤 도움을 줄 수 있느냐니까요.

1100705185.english: However, I believe that introductions are necessary to establish reliable evidence and clarify the chain of command.
1100705185.korean: 그래도 신뢰할 수 있는 증거와 명령 체계의 구체화를 위한 통성명은 필요하다고 생각됩니다.

1100705188.english: No, it's not so much that you can believe it, but that you'll have no choice but to follow it.
1100705188.korean: 아니, 믿어도 된다기보다는 따를 수밖에 없을 거야.

1100705190.english: This isn't a conversation we should be having in front of the person involved, is it?

1100705191.english: Especially in the urgent situation where 2,173 hostages are held by 118 hostage-takers.
1100705191.korean: 더군다나 2173명의 인질이 118명의 인질범에게 잡혀 있는 긴박한 상황에서는요.

1100705192.english: What? Okay. If we can end this hostage situation safely, any help would be welcome.
1100705192.korean: 뭐. 좋습니다. 이번 인질극을 무사히 끝낼 수 있다면 어떤 도움이든 환영이지요.

1100705193.english: So, how can we help you?
1100705193.korean: 자, 저희들에게 어떤 도움을 줄 수 있습니까?

1100705194.english: I'm kind of a negotiation expert.

1100705195.english: I understand there are no negotiations with terrorists...
1100705195.korean: 테러범과의 협상은 없는 것으로 알고 있는데…

1100705196.english: It's not a negotiation between the company, the government, and the terrorists.

1100705197.english: It's a negotiation between us and the terrorists.

1100705200.english: Please let me go to the scene.

1100705205.english: In return, I'll make you heroes.

1100705206.english: You became a hero, didn't you? It was splashed all over the news for several days.
1100705206.korean: 영웅이 됐었죠? 대서특필해서 며칠 동안 뉴스에 나왔으니.

1100705207.english: You too... you who played the biggest roles, should have become heroes.
1100705207.korean: 당신도… 가장 크게 활약을 한 당신들도 영웅이 되었어야 했었습니다.

1100705208.english: We lose most of our weapons the moment we step into the sunlight, right?
1100705208.korean: 저희는 양지에 드러나는 순간에 대부분의 무기를 잃어버리잖아요.

1100705209.english: But I'm grateful that you think of me as the same hero.
1100705209.korean: 하지만 같은 영웅으로 생각해주시는 건 감사해요.

1100705210.english: Due to the nature of our work, we rarely get praised by anyone.
1100705210.korean: 저희가 하는 일의 특성상 누구한테 칭찬 받는 일은 거의 없거든요.

1100705211.english: As a thank you, this round is on me.

1100705212.english: Two of what I was drinking here.

1100705213.english: ...Thinking about it, it's strange that we meet so often.
1100705213.korean: ……생각해보면 그렇게 자주 만나는 것도 참 이상하다 싶어요.

1100705214.english: You work in the sunshine, and I work in the shadows.
1100705214.korean: 양지에서 일하는 당신과 음지에서 일하는 저.

1100705215.english: Sometimes we clashed subtly because of conflicting goals, and other times we cooperated subtly to achieve the same goals.
1100705215.korean: 상반되는 목표 때문에 알게 모르게 대립할 때도 있었고, 같은 목표를 이루기 위해서 알게 모르게 협력할 때도 있었죠.

1100705216.english: Still, we're looking toward the same goal right now.
1100705216.korean: 그래도 지금은 같은 목표를 바라보고 있죠.

1100705219.english: When you say things like that, it doesn't sound like a complete joke.
1100705219.korean: 당신이 그런 말을 하면 완전한 농담으로 안 들리는군요.

1100705221.english: Anyway... since we've been meeting so often, I guess I've started to feel close to you too.
1100705221.korean: 어쨌든… 그렇게 자주 만나다 보니 저도 당신에게 친밀감을 느끼고 말았나 봐요.

1100705222.english: So that's why they ended up doing something like that at the time.
1100705222.korean: 그래서 그 때 그런 짓을 저지르고 만 거겠죠.

1100705223.english: Mongoose Team. Have you finished handing everything over?

1100705224.english: Yes. Ugh, my body is completely frozen from lying on the cold floor for so long.
1100705224.korean: 네. 으으, 오랫동안 찬 바닥에 엎드려있느라 몸이 다 얼어붙었어요.

1100705225.english: You're exaggerating. Are you saying that in front of me, flying through the air in the cold wind?
1100705225.korean: 엄살은. 찬 바람 맞아가며 공중 날아다니는 내 앞에서 할 말이야?

1100705226.english: We're all working hard together on this escort mission, so what's the point of arguing about who's working harder and who's working less? We'll just end up hurting each other's feelings.
1100705226.korean: 모두 같이 호위 임무하면서 고생하는 데 누구는 더 고생하고, 누구는 덜 고생한다고 따져서 뭐해? 서로 빈정만 상하지.

1100705227.english: I was incredibly comfortable. Because all I had to do was guard the room door in the hotel hallway.
1100705227.korean: 나는 엄청 편했어. 호텔 복도에서 방 문을 지키기만 하면 됐으니까.

1100705231.english: This is the Mongoose team. All team members have completed the handover.
1100705231.korean: 여기는 몽구스 팀. 팀원 전원 교대 인수인계를 마쳤습니다.

1100705232.english: I will be resting inside the hotel until further instructions or an emergency arises.
1100705232.korean: 추가 명령 혹은 비상 상황이 있기 전까지 호텔 내부에서 휴식을 취하고 있겠습니다.

1100705233.english: Mongoose Team. Please rest inside the hotel until further instructions or an emergency arises.
1100705233.korean: 몽구스 팀. 추가 명령 혹은 비상 상황이 있기 전까지 호텔 내부에서 휴식을 취하십시오.

1100705234.english: How exciting! I should take a shower!

1100705235.english: Miho! First, don't just go and shower by yourself! Decide the order!
1100705235.korean: 미호! 먼저 멋대로 혼자 샤워하지마! 순서 정해!

1100705236.english: I told you not to fight...

1100705237.english: But... which room was our break room?

1100705239.english: Should I buy some sandwiches for the kids... for the team members?

1100705244.english: When they said I'd be on the same mission as the Mongoose team... I had a feeling.
1100705244.korean: 몽구스 팀이랑 같은 임무를 맡게 될 거라고 했을 때… 혹시나 하는 생각을 했는데.

1100705245.english: It seems my fears have been confirmed.

1100705246.english: I don't particularly like the idea of fate, but when we run into each other this often, I can't help but think there's something more to it.
1100705246.korean: 운명이라는 것은 별로 좋아하지 않지만 이렇게 자주 마주치면 무언가가 있다고밖에 생각할 수밖에 없네요.

1100705249.english: I don't particularly enjoy it, and since I'm on a mission, I don't intend to drink any.
1100705249.korean: 딱히 즐기지도 않고, 임무 중이기에 마실 생각도 없습니다.

1100705251.english: It's not about drinking alcohol, it's about talking to you.
1100705251.korean: 술을 마시는 게 목적이 아니라 당신이랑 대화하는 게 목적인데.

1100705252.english: I think you'd like to talk to me too, wouldn't you?
1100705252.korean: 당신도 저랑 이야기하고 싶을 거라 생각이 드는데요?

1100705258.english: Who do you think it is?

1100705259.english: If my memory serves me correctly, I believe he was an arms dealer who supplied weapons to terrorists.
1100705259.korean: 제 기억이 맞다면 테러리스트들에게 무기를 대주는 무기상이었던 것으로 기억합니다.

1100705260.english: And also being one of the hostages during the hostage situation at the hospital.
1100705260.korean: 그리고 병원에서 인질극이 있었을 때 인질 중 한 명이었던 것도.

1100705261.english: Also... we met again during the Inferno Tower hostage situation, where you were the Black River's negotiation expert.
1100705261.korean: 또… 인페르노 타워 인질극 때 블랙 리버의 협상 전문가로도 마주쳤었죠.

1100705262.english: Beside that, we also ran into each other here and there on set.

1100705263.english: I believe they are someone who works secretly for the company and the government.
1100705263.korean: 회사와 정부를 위해서 은밀하게 일하는 사람일 거라 판단됩니다.

1100705264.english: The world is so vast, and there are so many people.
1100705264.korean: 세상은 이렇게 넓고, 사람은 그렇게 많은데.

1100705265.english: Even tho our fields overlap to some extent, it's still surprising to run into each other so often like this. Isn't that amazing?
1100705265.korean: 활동하는 분야가 어느 정도 겹친다고 하더라도 이렇게 자주 마주치다니. 참 신기하죠?

1100705266.english: Since we'll probably be seeing each other often from now on, it's probably a good idea to introduce ourselves.
1100705266.korean: 앞으로도 자주 만날 것 같으니 통성명을 하는 것이 좋을 거 같네요.

1100705268.english: As you said, I'm an agent who works for the company and the government.
1100705268.korean: 당신의 말대로 회사와 정부를 위해서 움직이는 요원이에요.

1100705269.english: It's not something you say after hearing everything, but...
1100705269.korean: 다 듣고 나서 할 말은 아니지만…

1100705270.english: Are you sure it's okay to reveal your identity like this?
1100705270.korean: 이렇게 자기 정체를 밝히셔도 되는 겁니까?

1100705271.english: Due to the nature of my role, I'm granted a certain degree of autonomy.
1100705271.korean: 저의 임무의 특성상 저는 어느 정도 자율성을 보장받거든요.

1100705273.english: If revealing my identity would be harmful, I could just pretend it never happened.
1100705273.korean: 저의 정체를 밝힌 것이 해가 된다면 없던 것으로 만들 수도 있으니까요.

1100705277.english: I'm sorry. It was a threat.

1100705278.english: I don't want our relationship to be like this.
1100705278.korean: 당신이랑은 이런 관계가 되는 것은 원하지 않아요.

1100705279.korean: 그냥 그럴 수도 있다고 생각만 해주세요.

1100705280.english: What I hope is that our meeting will serve as a bridge for smooth collaboration between the Mongoose team and our organization.
1100705280.korean: 제가 바라는 건 당신과 저의 만남이 몽구스 팀과 저희 조직간의 원활한 공조를 위한 교두보가 되는 거예요.

1100705281.english: It might feel like the gambler's fallacy, but I've encountered it so often until now that I feel like I'll keep encountering it frequently in the future.
1100705281.korean: 도박사의 오류처럼 느껴질 수도 있지만 지금까지 이렇게 자주 마주쳤는데 앞으로도 자주 마주칠 거 같으니까요.

1100705282.english: Wouldn't it be easier to cooperate if we know each other, rather than just one person knowing the other?
1100705282.korean: 일방적으로 아는 것보다 서로 알고 있으면 더 협력하기 쉽겠죠?

1100705283.english: Isn't there a way to formally request cooperation?
1100705283.korean: 정식으로 공조를 요청하는 방법도 있지 않나요?

1100705284.english: Heh, you're probably used to that.

1100705285.english: But leaving traces like that isn't our way.
1100705285.korean: 하지만 그렇게 흔적을 남기는 건 저희들의 방식이 아니에요.

1100705286.english: As if it never existed from the beginning.

1100705288.english: I'd like to continue our conversation, but...

1100705292.english: I don't like owing people money.

1100705294.english: Then have a good night, HongRyeon.

1100705297.english: Do you sell sandwiches here too?

1100705301.english: Actually... I wanted to talk to you more back then.
1100705301.korean: 사실… 그 때 당신이랑 더 대화를 나누고 싶었어요.

1100705306.english: Of course, it's not a real family, but I envied you for being able to create such a close relationship.
1100705306.korean: 물론 실제의 가족은 아니지만 그만큼 친밀한 관계를 만들 수 있는 당신이 부러웠어요.

1100705307.english: As you know, I, or rather, our institution, was unable to create such a thing.
1100705307.korean: 아시다시피 저는, 저희 기관은 그런 것을 만들 수 없었으니까요.

1100705308.english: Even if you create them, they're just fake, temporary, instant relationships.
1100705308.korean: 만들어도 가짜, 일시적인, 인스턴트 같은 관계일뿐이죠.

1100705309.english: Even within the organization, members kept a certain distance from each other.
1100705309.korean: 기관 내부에서도 조직원들끼리 서로 일정한 거리를 뒀고요.

1100705311.english: Not at that time, but as time passed, I also wanted to talk to you more.
1100705311.korean: 그 당시는 아니지만… 시간이 지나고 저도 당신과 더 대화를 나누고 싶었습니다.

1100705312.english: Because I was envious of you too.

1100705315.english: Of course, you can't become anything you want completely, but...
1100705315.korean: 물론 완전히 자신이 원하는 대로 무엇이든지 될 수 있는 건 아니지만.

1100705316.english: I was envious that they could be so many different things, not just one role.
1100705316.korean: 하나의 역할만 하는 것이 아니라 다양한 모습이 될 수 있는 게 부러웠습니다.

1100705317.english: The freedom to play a role that doesn't allow you to become the person you want to be isn't true freedom.
1100705317.korean: 자신이 원하는 모습이 되지 못하는 역할의 자유는 진정한 자유가 아니에요.

1100705318.english: Because they had to become something they didn't want to be.
1100705318.korean: 자신이 원하지 않는 모습도 어쩔 수 없이 되어야 했으니까요.

1100705319.english: While it's not entirely applicable to the current situation...
1100705319.korean: 지금 상황에 완전히 맞는 말은 아니지만…

1100705320.english: There's also a saying like this, isn't there? "Other people are hell." said.

1100705322.english: I didn't say that to get an apology, but... well. Don't worry about it.
1100705322.korean: 사과 들으려고 한 말은 아니지만… 뭐. 신경 쓰지 마세요.

1100705323.english: Because I'm very satisfied with who I am now.

1100705327.english: It wouldn't be an exaggeration to say I'm happy.

1100705328.english: It's not just ending with C-77 Crimson.
1100705328.korean: 단순히 C-77 홍련에서 끝나는 게 아니라.

1100705329.english: As my interactions with other people increased, I became happier.
1100705329.korean: 다른 사람들과의 교류가 늘어나면서 더욱 행복해졌습니다.

1100705330.english: I'm happy to be able to contribute to humanity, and I'm happy to have good colleagues.
1100705330.korean: 인류를 위해서 공헌할 수 있는 것이 기쁘고, 좋은 동료를 둬서 기쁘고.

1100705331.english: Thanks to the mongoose kids. And thanks to my younger sibling, JangHwa.
1100705331.korean: 몽구스 아이들 덕분에. 그리고 장화라는 동생 덕분에.

1100705333.english: I'm happy to have a genuine friendship with you.
1100705333.korean: 당신과… 거짓 없는 우정을 나눌 수 있어 기쁩니다.

1100705335.english: Oh no... my face is getting hot.

1100705338.english: To celebrate this joy, we'll need something stronger than milk.
1100705338.korean: 이 기쁨을 축하하기 위해서는 우유보다 더 진한 게 필요하겠네요.

1100705339.english: Surely you're not saying you can't drink alcohol just because it was restored recently, are you?
1100705339.korean: 설마 복원된 지 얼마 안 됐다고 알코올은 못 마신다고 하시지는 않겠죠?

1100705341.english: You can't refuse a drink your friend offers, can you?
1100705341.korean: 친구가 권하는 술을 거절할 수는 없겠죠.

1100705343.english: Please take a new order here.

1100705344.english: - I wake up with a throbbing headache.

1100705350.english: I was so worried when you came home drunk yesterday.
1100705350.korean: 어제 술에 취해서 돌아오셔서 얼마나 걱정했는데요.

1100705353.english: Seriously. Aren't you making us worry too much?
1100705353.korean: 정말이지. 저희들 너무 걱정하게 만드는 거 아니에요?

1100705362.english: Yesterday, when you were drunk, you kept hugging us and telling us you loved us.
1100705362.korean: 어제 술에 취한 채로 저희들 끌어안고 사랑한다고 계속 말해주셨잖아요.

1100705368.english: I showed a shameful side of myself...

1100705371.english: Hehe, I know. That's not what I meant.
1100705371.korean: 헤헤, 알고 있어요. 그런 의미가 아니라는 걸.

1100705372.english: While I was worried about Mom getting completely drunk, I was happy that she was being honest and opening up to us.
1100705372.korean: 엄마가 만취하는 건 걱정되지만 솔직하게 저희에게 마음을 드러내는 건 기뻤어요.

1100705379.english: Oh my goodness! Have you forgotten everything?

1100705380.english: ...I'm embarrassed to say, but my memory is blank.

1100705381.english: Well, after drinking that Lady Killer, what can you expect?
1100705381.korean: 뭐, 레이디 킬러를 그렇게 마셨으니 어쩔 수 없죠.

1100705385.english: What preparations are you referring to?

1100705387.english: Getting ready to be a woman.

1100705389.english: You ordered it last night, so I finished composing and writing the lyrics overnight.
1100705389.korean: 어제 저녁에 주문하셔서… 밤새도록 작곡 작사 다 마쳤어요.

1100705391.english: I must have gotten carried away because I was drunk too.
1100705391.korean: 저도 술에 취해서 경우를 벗어났나 봐요.

1100705392.english: But a good song came out.

1100705393.english: Because I was able to hear their true feelings, which were more interesting than a hundred romance novels.
1100705393.korean: 백 편의 연애 소설보다 더 흥미로운 속마음을 들을 수 있었으니까요.

1100705397.english: Haha, I should have more drinking parties.

1100705398.english: I never knew HongRyeon had so many hidden feelings in her heart.
1100705398.korean: 홍련의 가슴 속에 그렇게 숨겨진 마음이 많았다니.

1100705400.english: Oh my, is it already over?

1100705401.english: Of course. If it falls into my hands, something like this will be over in a flash.
1100705401.korean: 당연하지. 내 손에 걸리면 이런 일 정도는 순식간에 끝나지.

1100705402.english: If you were always that quick with your work, sister, how wonderful would that be?
1100705402.korean: 평소에도 그렇게 일처리가 빨랐으면 얼마나 좋았을까요, 언니.

1100705405.english: Yesterday, after hearing HongRyeon's words, I suddenly got inspired.
1100705405.korean: 어제 홍련의 말을 듣고 인스피레이션이 딱 왔어.

1100705406.english: So I finished it in no time.

1100705408.english: Yeah. Yeah. It really suits you.

1100705410.english: Um, excuse me. It's a bit revealing...
1100705410.korean: 저, 저기. 조금 노출이 많은 게…

1100705411.english: Huh? What are you saying in Orca?

1100705412.english: It's completely wholesome, isn't it? It's as wholesome as it could possibly be.
1100705412.korean: 완전 건전한데? 이보다 건전할 수 없을 정도로 건전한데?

1100705415.english: I'm going to get my clothes altered...

1100705420.english: Cat imitation...? This, this is how you do it... Right, meow...?
1100705420.korean: 고양이 흉내...? 이, 이렇게 하는 거... 맞, 냥...?

1100705421.english: Oh... Hehe. Master, please pet me more.

1100705422.english: JangHwa is a good child, so even more, even more...
1100705422.korean: 장화는 착한 아이니까 더, 더 많이...

1100705424.english: Okay, that looks good on you.

1100705427.english: This operation calls for a Doom Bringer, capable of maneuverability and precise fire projection!
1100705427.korean: 이 작전은 기동성과 화력 정밀 투사가 가능한 둠 브링어가 적격이라고!

1100705428.english: The Doom Bringer's mobility, burst damage, and range are superior to the Cannoneer's. I'll admit that.
1100705428.korean: 둠 브링어의 기동성과 순간 화력 투사, 사정거리는 캐노니어 이상이지. 그건 인정한다.

1100705429.english: However, as I've said many times, the Cannonier is superior to the Doom Bringer in terms of sustained firepower, cost-effectiveness, and stability.
1100705429.korean: 하지만 누차 말했듯이 화력 투사 지속성과 경제성, 안정성은 캐노니어가 둠 브링어보다 우월하지.

1100705430.english: For this operation, where it's difficult to determine the density of the enemy's air defenses and whether reinforcements will arrive, the cannoneer is the most suitable for providing fire support.
1100705430.korean: 적의 방공망 밀도와 증원 여부 확정이 힘든 이 작전의 화력 지원은 캐노니어가 적격이다.

1100705431.english: I think it's appropriate to pour on the firepower to the point where it seems excessive.
1100705431.korean: 화력은 과잉이라고 생각될 정도로 퍼붓는 게 적당하다고.

1100705432.english: Please keep in mind that your allies could also be harmed.
1100705432.korean: 아군에게도 피해가 갈 수 있다는 것은 염두에-

1100705434.english: Excessive firepower is not actually excessive firepower-

1100705435.english: No, that's not what I meant.

1100705438.english: To be honest, I wish I had a bit more confidence.
1100705438.korean: 솔직하게 말하자면 좀 더 자신감을 가졌으면 좋겠네요.

1100705439.english: On the main stage, I won't be the only one in the audience.
1100705439.korean: 본 무대에서는 관객이 저만 있는 게 아닐 테니.

1100705441.english: Does Inspector HongRyeon enjoy singing too?

1100705443.english: Why the song all of a sudden?

1100705446.english: Is HongRyeon, the police superintendent, also trying to seduce the commander?

1100705447.english: What? Is that how it is?

1100705448.english: If that's the case, leave it to me, the expert.

1100705449.english: I'll teach you as much as you need.

1100705454.english: Well... in the end, if it turned out well, then that's all that matters.
1100705454.korean: 뭐… 결과적으로 좋았으면 다 좋은 거겠지.

1100705455.english: Getting back to the main point...

1100705458.english: If you could help me... I would be very grateful.

1100705460.english: How could I refuse when HongRyeon, the police superintendent, says they need help?
1100705460.korean: 홍련 경무관이 도움이 필요하다는데 어떻게 거절할 수 있겠나.

1100705461.english: With confidence, you're halfway there in singing.
1100705461.korean: 노래는 자신감이 있으면 반은 먹고 들어가지.

1100705468.english: - There was a lot of buzz going around about a new jazz bar that had recently opened.
1100705468.korean: - 요즘 새로 생긴 재즈바에 대한 소문이 한창 돌고 있었다.

1100705469.english: - The drinks they offer are great, but the atmosphere and stage facilities are also well-equipped, making the performances very impressive.
1100705469.korean: - 제공하는 음료도 음료지만 분위기나 무대 시설이 잘 갖춰져 있어 공연이 무척이나 인상 깊다던가.

1100705470.english: - Having finished all the important tasks and finally having a little breathing room, I decided to go to a jazz bar.
1100705470.korean: - 중요한 일거리는 전부 처리하고 조금 한숨을 돌릴 여유가 생겼기에 재즈바를 찾아가기로 했다.

1100705471.english: - The jazz bar was quite atmospheric, just as the rumors said.

1100705472.english: - Familiar faces were seen here and there in the jazz bars.

1100705473.english: - They recognized me and greeted me, and I greeted them back.
1100705473.korean: - 그녀들은 나를 알아보고 인사를 건넸고, 나도 인사를 건넸다.

1100705474.english: - And not long after I sat down, the familiar face I expected sat in front of me.
1100705474.korean: - 그리고 내가 자리에 앉고 얼마 지나지 않아, 역시나 익숙한 얼굴이 내 앞에 앉았다.

1100705476.english: I was eagerly waiting for you to come.

1100705477.english: Heh, actually, I didn't wait that long.
1100705477.korean: 후후, 사실 그렇게 오래 기다리지는 않았어요.

1100705478.english: It hasn't even been two days since I started waiting.

1100705479.english: Hmph, I didn't expect you to come in just two days after the rumor spread.
1100705479.korean: 후후, 소문을 내고 이틀만에 올 줄이야.

1100705481.english: - Since Amy wouldn't hurt me, I replied playfully.
1100705481.korean: - 에이미가 나에게 무슨 해를 입힐 리 없었기에 나는 장난스럽게 대답했다.

1100705482.english: Oh, you think I have ulterior motives? As I've always said, I'm always genuine with myself.
1100705482.korean: 어머, 속셈이라뇨? 언제나 말했듯이 저는 언제나 자기에게 진심이에요.

1100705483.english: They definitely have an ulterior motive.

1100705485.english: But today, it's not for my benefit.
1100705485.korean: 하지만 오늘은 저를 위한 속셈이 아니에요.

1100705486.english: No. Indirectly speaking, it could be seen as being for my benefit as well.
1100705486.korean: 아니다. 간접적으로 보자면 절 위한 속셈이기도 하겠네요.

1100705487.english: - Amy's ambiguous words made me tilt my head.
1100705487.korean: - 에이미의 아리송한 말에 나는 고개를 갸웃거렸다.

1100705488.english: - In the meantime, the song ended.

1100705489.english: - With applause, the singer, Arsenal, took a bow and left the stage.
1100705489.korean: - 박수와 함께 가수, 아스널은 감사 인사를 하고 무대에서 내려갔다.

1100705491.english: - It was HongRyeon, the operations officer of the Mongoose team.

1100705492.english: - Looking alluring in a way you don't usually see, she greeted them with a familiar air and began to sing.
1100705492.korean: - 평소에는 볼 수 없는 고혹적인 모습을 한 그녀는 익숙한 태도로 인사를 하고 노래를 부르기 시작했다.

1100705493.english: - The sight of her, so unexpected from her usual demeanor, left me dumbfounded as I listened to her sing.
1100705493.korean: - 평소의 모습으로는 전혀 예상할 수 없는 모습에 나는 멍하니 그녀의 노래를 들었다.

1100705494.english: - A long while after the song ended and a little time had passed, I came to my senses and belatedly applauded.
1100705494.korean: - 한참 후 노래가 끝나고 조금이 지난 후에 나는 정신을 차리고 뒤늦게 박수를 쳤다.

1100705495.english: - HongRyeon thanked them, sighed, and then slowly opened her mouth.
1100705495.korean: - 홍련은 감사 인사를 하고 한숨을 내쉰 후에 천천히 입을 열었다.

1100705496.english: Today's stage is more tense and exciting than ever.
1100705496.korean: 오늘 무대는 그 어느 때보다 긴장되면서도 설레네요.

1100705497.english: Because the people I cherish have joined me here.
1100705497.korean: 제가 소중히 여기는 분들께서 자리를 함께 해주셨으니까요.

1100705498.english: As you already know, I'll introduce myself again.
1100705498.korean: 이미 다 아시겠지만 다시 제 소개를 할게요.

1100705502.english: A member of the Orca commanders.

1100705503.english: The operations officer for the Mongoose team.

1100705505.english: After many years, finally becoming family, one older sister.
1100705505.korean: 오랜 세월이 지나 마침내 가족이 된 한 명의 언니.

1100705506.english: And... although not related by blood, she is always the mother who cherishes the children in her heart.
1100705506.korean: 그리고… 핏줄로 이어지진 않았지만 언제나 가슴으로 소중히 여기는 아이들의 엄마죠.

1100705507.english: Someone said. "Other people are hell." said.

1100705508.english: I agree with this statement to some extent, but at the same time, I also want to say this.
1100705508.korean: 이 말에 저는 어느 정도 동의하지만 동시에 이 말도 하고 싶어요.

1100705509.english: "Hell is other people." You said that.

1100705510.english: Sometimes we suffer because of the judgments and evaluations of others, but sometimes we are happy because of the judgments and evaluations of others.
1100705510.korean: 타인의 판단과 평가에 의해 고통을 받을 때도 있지만 타인의 판단과 평가로 인해 행복할 때도 있어요.

1100705511.english: The me that others see. A Bioroid, a commander, an operations officer, a friend, a sister, a family member - all of these things make up who I am and make me happy.
1100705511.korean: 타인이 바라보는 저. 바이오로이드이자 지휘관, 작전관, 친구, 언니, 가족 이 모든 것들이 저를 구성하고, 저를 행복하게 해요.

1100705512.english: And today, at this very moment, thanks to another person, I have become even happier.
1100705512.korean: 그리고 오늘 이 순간 또 다른 타인 덕분에 저는 더욱 행복해졌어요.

1100705513.english: - As she said that, HongRyeon was looking straight at me.
1100705513.korean: - 그렇게 말하는 홍련은 똑바로 나를 바라보고 있었다.

1100705515.english: What more needs to be said here?

1100705516.english: Leaving aside everything they are – a Bioroid, an operator, someone's colleague, friend, or family member…
1100705516.korean: 바이오로이드, 작전관, 누군가의 동료, 친구, 가족이라는 모든 것을 떠나서…

1100705517.english: Just for this moment... just for tonight... please see me only as a woman.
1100705517.korean: 지금 이 순간만큼은… 오늘 밤만큼은 저를 여자로만 봐주세요.

1100705518.english: I dedicate this song to you.

1100705519.english: The song title is Secret Night.

1100705521.english: - A song that sticks in your ears.

1100705522.english: - As she said, not a Bioroid, an operator, someone's colleague, friend, or family.
1100705522.korean: - 그녀의 말마따나 바이오로이드, 작전관, 누군가의 동료, 친구, 가족이 아니라.

1100705523.english: - She was singing only as a woman.

1100705524.english: - That song was only for me.
1100705524.korean: - 그 노래는 오직 나를 향하고 있었다.

1100705525.english: - When I came to, only HongRyeon and I were left in the jazz bar.
1100705525.korean: - 정신을 차렸을 때, 재즈바에는 홍련과 나만 남아있었다.

1100705527.english: - Only the woman and the man were left.

1100705528.english: Did that happen while we were gone?
1100705528.korean: 우리가 없는 사이에 그런 일이 있었어?

1100705529.english: Yes! If you had heard the song your mom was singing, you would have been surprised too, wouldn't you?
1100705529.korean: 응! 엄마가 부르는 노래를 들었으면 너희도 깜짝 놀랐을 걸?

1100705530.english: My mom could sing this well?
1100705530.korean: 엄마가 이렇게 노래를 잘 부르셨단 말이야?

1100705531.english: Of course. Whose mom are you?

1100705533.english: But where did Bulgasari and Draco go?
1100705533.korean: 그런데 불가사리랑 드라코 어디 갔다 온 거야?

1100705536.english: Fortunately, they didn't teach me anything bad...
1100705536.korean: 다행히 나쁜 것을 가르쳐주고 그러지는 않았는데…

1100705537.english: Do you know that even just listening to that conversation makes me feel like my brain is shutting down?
1100705537.korean: 옆에서 듣고만 있어도… 뇌사하는 느낌이 드는 대화라는 거 알아?

1100705538.english: Brain death? Did you say "brain-shattering" wrong?

1100705539.english: Brain death... a conversation that feels like your brain cells are being swept away if you let your guard down even a little.
1100705539.korean: 뇌사… 조금만 정신을 놓아버리면 뇌세포들이 휩쓸리는 느낌의 대화.

1100705540.english: I don't know what you're talking about.

1100705541.english: Yeah... there are some things in the world that are better left unknown...
1100705541.korean: 응… 세상에는 모르는 게 좋은 것도 있어…

1100705543.english: The next training schedule has been set.

1100705544.english: This time, it's a joint operation with other combat units, so please prepare thoroughly, even for safety's sake.
1100705544.korean: 이번에는 다른 전투부대와의 합동 작전이니 안전을 위해서라도 철저하게 준비해주세요.

1100705545.english: You're back to your usual self, Mom.

1100705546.english: As a mother who loves us?

1100705547.english: Hehe. Mom always loves us, doesn't she?

1100705550.english: Mom. Please tell me you love me as enthusiastically as you did when we drank before.
1100705550.korean: 엄마. 전에 술 마셨을 때처럼 적극적으로 사랑한다고 해주세요.

1100705552.english: I'll try to say "I love you" more often, even when it's not a special occasion.
1100705552.korean: 평소에도 사랑한다는 말을 할 수 있게 노력할게요.

1100705557.english: Really? I should have come earlier.
1100705557.korean: 그래? 더 일찍 찾아올 걸 그랬네.

1100705562.english: I was so nervous until Master finished speaking. It's like waiting for the results after a performance. And the result was... haha! It seems like the name of this place has been decided! Not Kiss and Cry, but Kiss and Smile! Kiss me. And smile for me. And let's be happy forever!
1100705562.korean: 주인님의 말이 모두 끝날 때까지 얼마나 긴장했는지 몰라. 마치 연기 후에 결과를 기다릴 때처럼 말이야. 그리고 그 결과는… 하하! 이곳의 이름이 정해진 거 같아! 키스 앤 크라이가 아니라 키스 앤 스마일로! 키스해줘. 그리고 웃어줘. 그리고 영원히 행복해지자!

1100705563.english: Your Excellency… As you know, I was born to harm others. Even my name proves this. Nevertheless, if you choose to love me… I will return to you as much as I have received. No. I will return even more love than that. It seems I have just gained another reason to cultivate more refinement.
1100705563.korean: 각하… 아시다시피 저는 누군가를 해치기 위해서 태어났습니다. 저의 이름조차 이를 증명합니다. 그럼에도 저를 사랑하시겠다면… 제가 받은 사랑만큼. 아니. 그 이상의 사랑을 각하께 돌려드리겠습니다. 좀 더 교양을 쌓아야하는 이유가 늘었군요.

1100705564.english: I think I've caught the most popular disease in Orca. It's homesickness. Huhu, but it'll be okay now. Because I just received the perfect cure for lovesickness. You mean Master's love, right? As a doctor, I should hope that a miracle cure spreads widely, but for now, I need to focus on treating my own illness. I love you, Master.
1100705564.korean: 오르카에서 가장 유행하는 병에 걸린 것 같아요. 상사병 말이에요. 후후, 하지만 이제는 괜찮을 거예요. 상사병의 특효약을 지금 받았으니까요. 주인님의 사랑을 말이죠. 의사로서 특효약이 널리 퍼지길 바라야겠지만… 지금 만큼은 저의 병을 치료하는 데에 집중해야겠네요. 사랑해요, 주인님.

1100705565.english: Seeing my heart pounding, my face flush, sweating, breathing becoming rapid, my chest feeling tight, and my mind going blank… this illness… these symptoms… must be love. Hehe, how about you, Master? If you are like me… I will do my utmost. I will nurse you for the rest of your life.
1100705565.korean: 심장 고동이 격해지고, 얼굴이 달아오르고, 땀이 나고, 호흡이 가빠지고, 가슴이 답답해지고, 머릿속이 하얗게 변하는 것을 보면… 이 병은… 이 증상은… 사랑…이네요. 후후, 주인님은 어떠 신가요? 저와 같다면… 최선을 다해서. 평생을 간호해 드릴게요.

1100705566.english: ...I didn't expect that. My master is like the sun in the sky, and I was happy just being by their side... I never thought you would bestow such love upon me... My heart feels like it's going to burst from so much happiness. Master... my beloved master. Starting today, this beta will serve you, Master, by your side for the rest of my life...
1100705566.korean: …예상하지 못했어요. 주인님은 저 하늘의 태양 같으신 분이라, 저는 그냥 옆에 있는 것 만으로도 행복했는데... 제게 이렇게 사랑을 내려주실 줄이야… 너무 큰 행복 때문에 가슴이 터질 것 같아요. 주인님… 나의 사랑하는 주인님. 오늘부터 저 베타가, 평생 곁에서 주인님을 모실게요...

1100705572.english: … I don't think the Metal Parasites are visible yet.

1100705574.english: … Theres still no movement. The drone hasn't caught anything either.
1100705574.korean: …아직 움직임은 없어요. 드론에도 뭔가 잡히는 건 없고요.

1100705575.english: Let's go into the city now. You should get some sleep soon.
1100705575.korean: 이만 도시 안으로 들어가시죠. 슬슬 주무셔야죠.

1100705576.english: ...I'll be back in a bit. You can rest first.
1100705576.korean: ...저는 조금만 더 있다가 들어가겠습니다. 먼저 쉬고 계시죠.

1100705577.english: … Then, please do this while eating it.

1100705578.english: This is a chocolate bar that Alvis gave me. She said she was saving it to give to her sisters… but I couldn't bring myself to eat it.
1100705578.korean: 알비스가 준 초코바에요. 언니들 주려고 아껴 둔 거라는데… 차마 먹을 수가 없더라고요.

1100705579.english: Thank you. Please tell Alvis I said thank you.

1100705580.english: - After Bheur went down, Sand Girl blankly stared at the snowy field.
1100705580.korean: - 베라가 내려간 뒤, 샌드걸은 멍하니 설원을 바라보았다.

1100705581.english: - Even though so many sisters had shed red blood on that snow, the snowfield still sparkled in a heartless white, as if it didn't even care about that.
1100705581.korean: - 그토록 많은 자매들이 저 눈 위에서 붉은 피를 흘렸건만, 설원은 그런 것은 신경조차 쓰지 않겠다는 듯, 아직도 무정한 흰색으로 반짝이고 있었다.

1100705582.english: …What on earth are we guarding here for?
1100705582.korean: …우린 대체 뭘 위해 여길 지키고 있는 걸까.

1100705583.english: - An order given before the destruction? Or, a sense of duty to stop the Metal Parasite?
1100705583.korean: - 멸망 전에 내려온 명령? 아니면, 철충을 막아야만 한다는 의무감?

1100705584.english: Neither, Sand girl. The reason we guard this place is…
1100705584.korean: 둘 다 아니야, 샌드걸. 우리가 이 곳을 지키는 이유는…

1100705585.english: Just to have a hamburger in Fairbanks sometime.

1100705586.english: - Suddenly, a conversation they had had before came to mind, and Sand Girl snickered as she opened the chocolate bar's packaging.
1100705586.korean: - 문득 예전에 나눴던 대화가 떠올라, 샌드걸은 피식 웃으며 초코바의 포장을 벗겼다.

1100705588.english: That might be tough, but you could probably get a chocolate bar in Anchorage.
1100705588.korean: 그건 힘들겠지만, 앵커리지에서 초코바는 먹을 수 있겠네요.

1100705589.english: - At that moment, the communicator next to Sand Girl rang loudly.
1100705589.korean: - 그 때, 샌드걸 옆에 놓여 있던 통신기가 요란하게 울렸다.

1100705592.english: Long time no see, Sand Girl #209.

1100705593.english: What is the current situation on the Daecheolchung front?
1100705593.korean: 현재 대 철충 전선 상황은 어떻죠?

1100705594.english: It's not very good. Fort Clarence has fallen.
1100705594.korean: 상당히 좋지 않습니다. 포트 클레런스가 함락당했거든요.

1100705595.english: We were able to gather our remaining forces and successfully retreat to Anchorage, but the Metal Parasite's army was closing in on us.
1100705595.korean: 잔존 병력을 수습해 앵커리지로 후퇴하는 것에는 성공했지만, 철충의 군단이 코앞까지 들이닥친 상황입니다.

1100705596.english: It may seem like we're in a state of calm right now, but if the enemy goes on the offensive, we'll fall in an instant.
1100705596.korean: 지금 당장은 소강상태인 것 같지만… 적들이 공세로 나설 경우 순식간에 함락당하겠죠.

1100705597.english: … Anchorage? Even though the command center was completely destroyed during the Destruction War, have they already been pushed back that far?
1100705597.korean: …앵커리지? 아무리 멸망 전쟁 당시 지휘부가 전멸당했다고 해도, 벌써 거기까지 밀려난 건가요?

1100705598.english: … was pushed out… Its a bit much to say that. Its more like they chose to defend themselves against the enemies in Anchorage.
1100705598.korean: …밀려났다… 고 하기는 조금 그렇군요. 앵커리지에서 적들을 방어하기로 선택한 쪽에 가깝습니다.

1100705599.english: After all, the safe zones outside of Anchorage are not suitable for defending against the Metal Parasite's attack.
1100705599.korean: 아무래도 앵커리지 외의 안전구역들은 철충의 공세를 방어하는 것에 적합하지 않으니까요.

1100705600.english: … If only Captain Leona were alive, things would have been different…
1100705600.korean: …레오나 대장님만 살아 계셨다면 많은 게 달랐겠지만…

1100705602.english: … I spoke nonsense. Saying something like this now wont change anything.
1100705602.korean: …괜한 말을 했군요. 지금 이런 말을 해 봐야 달라지는 게 없는데.

1100705603.english: Anyway… be careful. Alaska was able to hold out thanks to the remaining defense forces, but Canada is in a worse situation than here.
1100705603.korean: 아무튼… 주의하십시오. 알래스카는 그나마 방위군이 남아있던 덕분에 버틸 수 있었지만, 캐나다는 여기보다 상황이 더 좋지 않으니까요.

1100705604.english: Unlike the eastern part of the United States, where the worms have been fairly well-organized, isn't Canada virtually occupied by worms, except for a few safe areas like Vancouver and Winnipeg?
1100705604.korean: 그나마 철충을 꽤 정리해 놓은 미 동부와는 달리, 캐나다는 밴쿠버나 위니펙 등 몇몇 안전구역 외에는 철충이 점령한 것이나 다름없는 곳 아닙니까?

1100705605.english: In this situation, if these guys were to join the horde of Metal Parasites that are invading Alaska right now…
1100705605.korean: 이 상황에서 지금 알래스카를 침공한 철충들의 무리에 녀석들이 합류하기라도 한다면…

1100705606.english: … Omega Industries headquarters would also be in danger.

1100705607.english: I'm sending reinforcements to Anchorage right now. So…
1100705607.korean: 지금 당장 앵커리지로 지원 병력을 보내겠습니다. 그러니…

1100705611.english: This is not the place to send reinforcements.
1100705611.korean: 지원 병력을 보내야 할 곳은 여기가 아닙니다.

1100705612.english: I'll try to buy you as much time as possible, so I recommend that you send troops to Canada as soon as possible. We're…
1100705612.korean: 이쪽에서 최대한 시간을 끌어드릴 테니, 되도록 빨리 캐나다 방면에 병력을 보내는 걸 추천하겠습니다. 저희는…

1100705614.english: Lieutenant Sand girl! It's the Metal Parasite! The Metal Parasite troops have appeared in front of the city!
1100705614.korean: 샌드걸 중위님! 철충입니다! 철충 병력이 도시 앞에 나타났습니다!

1100705615.english: I think you should check it out right now!

1100705619.english: … Thats right. It was completely wiped out without any survivors.

1100705621.english: But why are you here, Gamma? I'm sure I told you to focus on the northern front for the time being.
1100705621.korean: 그런데 당신은 왜 여기 있는 거죠, 감마? 분명 제가 당분간은 북부 전선에 집중하라고 했을 텐데요.

1100705622.english: Don't worry too much. I've sent an adjutant to that side. She's a smart kid, so she'll do fine without me.
1100705622.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마. 그 쪽에는 부관을 보내 놨거든. 똘똘한 애니까 내가 없어도 잘 할 거야.

1100705623.english: … Ha. Youve lived a long life and seen so many things. Who would have thought that a war-crazed person like you would say something like that?
1100705623.korean: …하. 세상 오래 살고 볼 일이군요. 전쟁에 미친 당신이 그런 말을 할 줄이야.

1100705624.english: Well, it's fun to destroy the Metal Parasites, but... the Northern Front is a bit boring.
1100705624.korean: 뭐, 철충을 박살내는 것도 재밌기는 하지만… 북부 전선은 좀 시시해서 말이야.

1100705625.english: There are factions within Cheolchung, and because they keep fighting amongst themselves, the fights aren't as interesting as you'd expect.
1100705625.korean: 철충 내부에서 파벌이 갈리기라도 하는지, 자기들끼리 싸워대는 통에 생각만큼 재밌는 싸움이 안 벌어지거든.

1100705626.english: … Didn't you think of using that gap to push out Cheolchung and stabilize the North?
1100705626.korean: …그 틈을 타서 철충을 밀어내고 북부를 안정화한다는 생각은 못 했나요?

1100705627.english: Well, that could be the case, but…

1100705628.english: …Why should I be the only one doing good things for you? The troops that go in there are mine.
1100705628.korean: …내가 왜 너만 좋은 일을 해 줘야 하는데? 거기 들어가는 병력은 내 건데 말이야.

1100705629.english: Shouldn't we be grateful that they are sending troops to block the advance of Cheolchung?
1100705629.korean: 병력을 파견해서 철충의 남하를 막아주는 것만으로도 감사해야 하지 않겠어?

1100705631.english: Above all, you can't miss such a big event!
1100705631.korean: 무엇보다 이런 빅 이벤트를 놓칠 수야 없잖아!

1100705632.english: The day will come when Beta, who has been living like a dead rat in South America, will move her heavy butt.
1100705632.korean: 그 동안 남미에서 쥐 죽은 듯이 살던 베타가 그 무거운 엉덩이를 움직이는 날이 오다니.

1100705633.english: Honestly, it's as hard to believe as the idea that Zeta does charity work.
1100705633.korean: 솔직히 제타가 자선사업을 벌인다는 얘기만큼이나 믿기 힘든 일이란 말이야.

1100705634.english: So I came to see Beta's face for the first time in a while.
1100705634.korean: 그러니 간만에 베타 얼굴이나 보러 온 거지.

1100705635.english: If someone heard us, they would think we were very close sisters.
1100705635.korean: 누가 들으면 아주 절친한 자매 사이인 줄 알겠네요.

1100705636.english: We're best friends... It's hard to say, but it's not that bad, is it?
1100705636.korean: 절친하다… 고 말하긴 힘들지만, 그렇게 나쁘진 않거든?

1100705637.english: Compared to you and Delta, Beta and I are best friends.
1100705637.korean: 너랑 델타에 비하면 나랑 베타는 베스트 프렌드라고 할 수 있을 정도지.

1100705638.english: That's Delta's problem more than mine. That woman has such a twisted personality.
1100705638.korean: 그건 저보다는 델타 쪽의 문제죠. 그 여자는 성격이 워낙 배배 꼬여 있었으니.

1100705639.english: You're a bitch with a twisted personality, aren't you?
1100705639.korean: 그러는 너도 꽤 성격이 뒤틀린 년이잖아?

1100705642.english: By the way, I think its about time I came now…
1100705642.korean: 그나저나, 이제 슬슬 올 때가 된 것 같은데…

1100705644.english: They say even a tiger will come if you call it.

1100705645.english: Come in, Beta! Let's see each other's faces for a second.
1100705645.korean: 들어오라고, 베타! 간만에 얼굴이나 좀 보자.

1100705646.english: … You haven't forgotten that this is my room and you are a guest, have you?
1100705646.korean: …여기가 제 방이고, 당신은 손님이라는 걸 잊은 건 아니겠죠?

1100705647.english: Then tell me not to come in?

1100705650.english: … Hello, Omega. And… I didn't expect to see you here, Gamma.
1100705650.korean: …안녕하세요, 오메가. 그리고… 여기서 볼 줄은 몰랐네요, 감마.

1100705651.korean: 예측할 수 없는 게 내 매력 아니겠어?

1100705652.english: Ignore them for a moment… So, what changed your mind?
1100705652.korean: 저쪽은 잠시 무시하고… 그래서, 무슨 심경의 변화가 생긴 거죠?
